title: Immediate Requirement Software Engineer at iGate India

jsonLd.title: Immediate Requirement Software Engineer at iGate India
jsonLd.description:
An exciting career opportunity awaits you at iGate India. We are on the lookout for a dedicated Software Engineer to strengthen our Bengaluru-based team.

About iGate India:
iGate India is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Write clean, maintainable, and well-documented code
• Design, develop and maintain scalable software applications
• Ensure code security and follow best practices for data protection
• Optimize application performance and ensure high availability
• Contribute to system architecture and technical design decisions
• Integrate third-party APIs and services
• Work with agile methodologies including daily stand-ups and sprint planning

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Bachelor's degree in a relevant field
• 6-10 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in TensorFlow
• Proficiency in Docker
• Proficiency in Agile/Scrum
• Proficiency in Kubernetes
• Proficiency in Microservices
• Proficiency in Rust
• Proficiency in JavaScript
• Proficiency in SQL

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• Recognition and rewards programs
• Life and accident insurance
• Provident Fund and Gratuity as per company policy
• Company-sponsored certifications
• International travel opportunities for senior roles
• Learning & development budget
• Salary Range: 12 LPA - 25 LPA per annum

Location: Bengaluru, Karnataka, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with iGate India!
